mechanism: Organosulfur compounds (including allicin-derived metabolites) modulate platelet aggregation, endothelial nitric oxide signaling, and inflammatory pathways.
safetyNotes: Common effects are GI upset and odor; supplemental garlic can increase perioperative bleeding risk. Stop high-dose supplements before surgery unless clinician-directed.

sources.title: Effects of garlic on cardiovascular disorders: a review (Nutr J. 2006)
Garlic and drug interactions: focus on saquinavir (Clin Infect Dis. 2002)
